Working x functionally is essential as a assistant product merchandiser. - An understanding of what makes a product appealing to consumers , especially in the European market. - Eye for detail to ensure accuracy across the tools & PLM systems - A basic knowledge of Excel or similar tools to help with data and product tracking. - A keen interest in fashion, retail, or product creation , and a desire to grow in this field. - A positive, can-do attitude , and a willingness to support the team wherever needed. What’s in it For You By joining our team, you will: - Learn how to build and manage a seasonal product line , from concept to market launch. - Gain exposure to real-time business decisions , using data to support product and commercial strategies. - Understand the role of merchandising within a global brand , and how it connects with marketing, sales, and product teams. - Develop your analytical and storytelling skills , turning numbers into product narratives. - Build a strong professional network , with opportunities to connect across teams, functions, and brands. - Receive mentorship and training , helping you grow your confidence and capabilities in a dynamic, international environment. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership In this internship, you’ll gain hands-on experience in how seasonal assortments are built and brought to life across the European market. You’ll work closely with experienced merchandisers, gaining exposure to product strategy, consumer insights, and cross-functional collaboration. We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0020

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Creative Designer Intern for The North Face. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) - Please make sure to upload both a CV and a portfolio ! Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for Retail Creative Designer Intern to contribute to creative research, concept development, and graphic design for our The North Face retail spaces. The intern will work closely with the team to transform ideas into visual and spatial concepts, supporting projects from inspiration to execution. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail Creative Designer Intern for: - Developing 2D graphic layouts for brand campaign storytelling that engages, informs, and inspires our consumers - Design POP and strut cards for in store communication (for campaigns, promotions, special communications) - Co-work with 3D designer for the creative proposal for window & instore campaign execution. - Supporting for the design of graphic identity for retail activations and special events - Supporting the design of flagships executions and adapting window & instore executions for special locations. - Hoarding graphics design for new store openings - Support the development of new creative ideas like wall customisations, creation of corners and study new design elements to inject in our new stores TNF brand DNA as briefed by Retail Architects. - Support retail adaptations for Wholesale stores - Support the creation of the monthly retail marketing newsletter How you will make a difference - A degree in design, product design, interior design, architecture, or graphic design - Proficiency in 2D and 3D software for graphic design and modelling - Strong creativity in graphic design and concept development - Proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) - Passion for creative research and innovation in graphic design and spatial development - Ability to envision and create compelling concepts, from mood boards to full spatial designs - Excellent attention to detail and team collaboration skills - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills Curious mindset with passion for working with people What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: • Project coordination • Retail marketing principles • How to elevate brand representation instore • Manage retail marketing database (instore and window pictures, measurements, floor plans) • You will be expose to all the retail marketing team members, learning key principles of retail architectures, visual merchandising, retail activations and creative environment The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. - Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260210-0017

The intern will work closely with the team to transform ideas into visual and spatial concepts, supporting projects from inspiration to execution. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail Creative Designer Intern for: - Developing 2D graphic layouts for brand campaign storytelling that engages, informs, and inspires our consumers - Design POP and strut cards for in store communication (for campaigns, promotions, special communications) - Co-work with 3D designer for the creative proposal for window & instore campaign execution. - Supporting for the design of graphic identity for retail activations and special events - Supporting the design of flagships executions and adapting window & instore executions for special locations. - Hoarding graphics design for new store openings - Support the development of new creative ideas like wall customisations, creation of corners and study new design elements to inject in our new stores TNF brand DNA as briefed by Retail Architects. - Support retail adaptations for Wholesale stores - Support the creation of the monthly retail marketing newsletter How you will make a difference - A degree in design, product design, interior design, architecture, or graphic design - Proficiency in 2D and 3D software for graphic design and modelling - Strong creativity in graphic design and concept development - Proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) - Passion for creative research and innovation in graphic design and spatial development - Ability to envision and create compelling concepts, from mood boards to full spatial designs - Excellent attention to detail and team collaboration skills - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills Curious mindset with passion for working with people What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: • Project coordination • Retail marketing principles • How to elevate brand representation instore • Manage retail marketing database (instore and window pictures, measurements, floor plans) • You will be expose to all the retail marketing team members, learning key principles of retail architectures, visual merchandising, retail activations and creative environment The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. - Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260210-0017

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Allocator Intern for Timberland. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you ready to turn data-driven decisions into winning retail strategies? Timberland is looking for a Retail Allocator intern to play a key role in ensuring the right product reaches the right store at the right time across EMEA. Support the allocation and replenishment of product to our EMEA retail stores by analysing sales trends, monitoring inventory levels, and ensuring accurate product flow to stores. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail allocator intern: - Report updating. - Manual allocation to stores. - Track stock levels, sales trends, and store performance to identify risks and opportunities, recommending adjustments to maximize in-season results. - Initial allocation set-up - Ad hoc analysis on products / performance. - Promotions upload in the system. - Warehouse logics and interaction. How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You enjoy working with data and transforming numbers into clear, meaningful insights that support better decision‑making across Allocation & Planning - You have strong problem‑solving skills , and you naturally look for patterns, root causes, and opportunities to improve processes. - You are detail‑oriented yet able to zoom out , balancing accuracy with a good understanding of the bigger commercial picture. - You are proactive and comfortable taking ownership , even when facing new or ambiguous tasks—your initiative helps move projects forward. - You are curious and eager to learn new tools , especially analytics platforms, reporting environments, and product systems (no prior expertise needed—just motivation). What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Deep understanding of retail environment across Europe - Interactions across the different department (planning, allocation, merchandising, operations, marketing) - Understand main logic of a specific category allocation, giving inputs on product needs. - Understand the differences across countries in regards to product trends. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260204-0003

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Trading Intern for Timberland. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Become the engine behind our Digital Trading performance. Step into a fast‑paced, data‑driven environment where your work will directly elevate how consumers shop our brand across eCommerce and Digital Marketplace partners. You will support and coordinate day‑to‑day digital trading activities to maximize visibility, conversion, and revenue across our owned eCommerce platforms and Digital Marketplace partners. Drive actionable insights, ensure flawless execution, and help optimize performance levers to accelerate digital growth. Furthermore, you will: - Monitor and update daily trading performance dashboards, surfacing insights that support decision‑making. - Support building and executing trading calendar and provide weekly/monthly updates to the extended cross-functional team. - Assist in demand & inventory reviews , helping identify risks and opportunities across key accounts and categories. - Conduct competitive benchmarking , identifying trends, best sellers, gaps, and potential growth levers. - Lead or support additional cross‑functional projects within the Digital Trading team to drive continuous improvement and operational excellence. How you will make a difference - Strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate numbers into clear, actionable insights. - Curiosity for digital commerce, performance optimization, and online consumer behavior. - Attention to detail and a proactive approach to spotting issues before they become problems. - Comfort with fast‑paced environments, managing multiple tasks while keeping quality high. - Ability to collaborate effectively across teams such as merchandising, planning, marketing, and digital operations. - Problem‑solving attitude, always looking for smarter, more efficient ways of working. What’s in it for you - Hands‑on experience in Digital Trading , one of the fastest‑growing areas in the retail & brand ecosystem. - Exposure to eCommerce and Marketplace operations , from onsite execution to performance analysis. - Practical knowledge of performance metrics , dashboards, and commercial KPIs used by leading digital retailers. - Experience working cross‑functionally with merchandising, planning, marketing, and digital operations teams. - The opportunity to contribute to real‑world digital initiatives, building a strong foundation for a future career in digital retail, eCommerce, or marketplace management. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0011

descriptionByLocale.en: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Trading Intern for Timberland. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Become the engine behind our Digital Trading performance. Step into a fast‑paced, data‑driven environment where your work will directly elevate how consumers shop our brand across eCommerce and Digital Marketplace partners. You will support and coordinate day‑to‑day digital trading activities to maximize visibility, conversion, and revenue across our owned eCommerce platforms and Digital Marketplace partners. Drive actionable insights, ensure flawless execution, and help optimize performance levers to accelerate digital growth. Furthermore, you will: - Monitor and update daily trading performance dashboards, surfacing insights that support decision‑making. - Support building and executing trading calendar and provide weekly/monthly updates to the extended cross-functional team. - Assist in demand & inventory reviews , helping identify risks and opportunities across key accounts and categories. - Conduct competitive benchmarking , identifying trends, best sellers, gaps, and potential growth levers. - Lead or support additional cross‑functional projects within the Digital Trading team to drive continuous improvement and operational excellence. How you will make a difference - Strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate numbers into clear, actionable insights. - Curiosity for digital commerce, performance optimization, and online consumer behavior. - Attention to detail and a proactive approach to spotting issues before they become problems. - Comfort with fast‑paced environments, managing multiple tasks while keeping quality high. - Ability to collaborate effectively across teams such as merchandising, planning, marketing, and digital operations. - Problem‑solving attitude, always looking for smarter, more efficient ways of working. What’s in it for you - Hands‑on experience in Digital Trading , one of the fastest‑growing areas in the retail & brand ecosystem. - Exposure to eCommerce and Marketplace operations , from onsite execution to performance analysis. - Practical knowledge of performance metrics , dashboards, and commercial KPIs used by leading digital retailers. - Experience working cross‑functionally with merchandising, planning, marketing, and digital operations teams. - The opportunity to contribute to real‑world digital initiatives, building a strong foundation for a future career in digital retail, eCommerce, or marketplace management. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0011

jobs.title: PR & Marketing Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as PR & Brand Comms Intern for Timberland. ## About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . ## ## Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months, full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) ## Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA citizenship ## Let’s talk about the role! Are you passionate about storytelling and ready to shape how an iconic brand shows up across EMEA? We are looking for a PR & Marketing Intern to join TIMBERLAND within VF EMEA Internship Program. Drive impactful brand visibility by coordinating press materials, managing media interactions, and contributing to best‑in-class storytelling initiatives. ## ## Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for Supporting in Press Relations & Brand communications at EMEA level: - Daily interaction and exchange with countries Marketing Manager, agencies, TBL & VF internal functions and global team. - Support in defining structured EMEA seasonal PR roll out plans for the key markets managed by EMEA HQ - Support in PR activities managed by EMEA HQ (Media partnership, event management, editors’ seedings, activations) - Manage and deliver Global Press material to markets and wider TBL team (press releases and PR assets in files) - Develop press material (copywriting and proofing, distribution, ...) - Brand Calendar management: working with all internal and agencies: keep track of our key global/EMEA/ markets dates and key marketing styles throughout the season. - Sample management - support the marketing team with seasonal sample orders including tracking of deliveries as well as ad hoc sample requests (photo shooting e.t.c) - Attend and record notes at the PR team meetings and work cross-functionally to support PR team - Create several reports and presentations on various product launches and initiatives. - Maintain and update EMEA master media lists and seeding lists. - Reporting: performance and KPIs monitoring and deliveries of campaign/ monthly / quarterly reports - Respond to media requests for samples, information and press releases in a timely manner. - Work closely with Internal team to create synergies and increase visibility for Timberland (newsletter/ media alert/ …) - Build and maintain knowledge of competitive PR: Monitor competitor activities and share as required. ## What success looks like: Your skills in continuous improvement, decision making, planning & organizing, and customer focus – combined with your talent for collaboration, communication, and leveraging cultural diversity – will contribute to the team’s success. You are also adaptable in using applied learning; you initiate action and have high work standards. ## How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You are fluent in English, with strong written communication skills and an instinct for brand storytelling. - You bring curiosity, adaptability, and the ability to thrive in fast‑paced, international environments. - You are proactive, well‑organized, and comfortable managing multiple tasks at once. - You are collaborative, culturally aware, and energized by connecting with people across teams and markets. - Previous experience through other internships, student projects, or extracurricular activities is considered a plus. ## A degree in Communications, Marketing, Fashion, Media or related fields is nice to have; what matters most is your passion and drive. ## What’s in it for you In this role, you will gain hands‑on experience at the intersection of PR, Marketing, and Brand Communication for one of the world’s most iconic outdoor lifestyle brands. At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have: - A deep understanding of how a global PR & Communications function operates in a multi‑market environment - Experience developing PR materials, managing press interactions, and supporting campaign execution - Strong skills in storytelling, content development, and cross‑functional coordination - Practical exposure to media relations, sample management, KPIs tracking, and PR reporting - A robust professional network across VF’s brands, teams, and markets ## The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12‑month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands‑on experience, including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. ## ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We celebrate the diversity of our associates and encourage everyone to bring their true selves to work every day. ## Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0011

descriptionByLocale.de: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as PR & Brand Comms Intern for Timberland. ## About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . ## ## Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months, full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) ## Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA citizenship ## Let’s talk about the role! Are you passionate about storytelling and ready to shape how an iconic brand shows up across EMEA? We are looking for a PR & Marketing Intern to join TIMBERLAND within VF EMEA Internship Program. Drive impactful brand visibility by coordinating press materials, managing media interactions, and contributing to best‑in-class storytelling initiatives. ## ## Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for Supporting in Press Relations & Brand communications at EMEA level: - Daily interaction and exchange with countries Marketing Manager, agencies, TBL & VF internal functions and global team. - Support in defining structured EMEA seasonal PR roll out plans for the key markets managed by EMEA HQ - Support in PR activities managed by EMEA HQ (Media partnership, event management, editors’ seedings, activations) - Manage and deliver Global Press material to markets and wider TBL team (press releases and PR assets in files) - Develop press material (copywriting and proofing, distribution, ...) - Brand Calendar management: working with all internal and agencies: keep track of our key global/EMEA/ markets dates and key marketing styles throughout the season. - Sample management - support the marketing team with seasonal sample orders including tracking of deliveries as well as ad hoc sample requests (photo shooting e.t.c) - Attend and record notes at the PR team meetings and work cross-functionally to support PR team - Create several reports and presentations on various product launches and initiatives. - Maintain and update EMEA master media lists and seeding lists. - Reporting: performance and KPIs monitoring and deliveries of campaign/ monthly / quarterly reports - Respond to media requests for samples, information and press releases in a timely manner. - Work closely with Internal team to create synergies and increase visibility for Timberland (newsletter/ media alert/ …) - Build and maintain knowledge of competitive PR: Monitor competitor activities and share as required. ## What success looks like: Your skills in continuous improvement, decision making, planning & organizing, and customer focus – combined with your talent for collaboration, communication, and leveraging cultural diversity – will contribute to the team’s success. You are also adaptable in using applied learning; you initiate action and have high work standards. ## How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You are fluent in English, with strong written communication skills and an instinct for brand storytelling. - You bring curiosity, adaptability, and the ability to thrive in fast‑paced, international environments. - You are proactive, well‑organized, and comfortable managing multiple tasks at once. - You are collaborative, culturally aware, and energized by connecting with people across teams and markets. - Previous experience through other internships, student projects, or extracurricular activities is considered a plus. ## A degree in Communications, Marketing, Fashion, Media or related fields is nice to have; what matters most is your passion and drive. ## What’s in it for you In this role, you will gain hands‑on experience at the intersection of PR, Marketing, and Brand Communication for one of the world’s most iconic outdoor lifestyle brands. At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have: - A deep understanding of how a global PR & Communications function operates in a multi‑market environment - Experience developing PR materials, managing press interactions, and supporting campaign execution - Strong skills in storytelling, content development, and cross‑functional coordination - Practical exposure to media relations, sample management, KPIs tracking, and PR reporting - A robust professional network across VF’s brands, teams, and markets ## The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12‑month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands‑on experience, including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. ## ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We celebrate the diversity of our associates and encourage everyone to bring their true selves to work every day. ## Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0011

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Merchandiser Intern for Timberland. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you ready to support driving the footwear merchandising vision for our key wholesale partners across EMEA, ensuring the right products, assortments, and strategies reach the right consumers at the right time? You will support the execution of the footwear merchandising strategy for our wholesale partners, ensuring the right assortments, pricing, and consumer‑relevant stories are delivered to maximize brand impact and sell‑through. Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Merchandiser Intern: - Support the coordination of seasonal assortments for wholesale accounts. - Manage all sample orders, tracking, organization, and meetings preparation. - Update PLM data to keep product information accurate and current. - Maintain LP documents, ensuring assortments and SKUs stay up to date. - Prepare presentations for sell‑in meetings and internal product reviews. - Assist with pricing checks, SKUs validation, and seasonal readiness tasks. - Collaborate with cross‑functional teams on merchandising initiatives. How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - Proactive mindset with the ability to take initiative and drive tasks forward. - Strong Excel and PowerPoint skills to support data analysis and presentation creation. - Open‑minded approach with curiosity for product, trends, and consumer behavior. - Effective collaborator who enjoys working within cross‑functional teams. - Fluent English communication in an international, fast‑paced environment. - Passion and sensitivity for fashion and footwear product . What’s in it for you At the end of the internship, you can expect to have a clear understanding of how to collaborate with the Global Footwear team in the US, how to partner effectively with EMEA Sales and Marketing, and how to deliver impactful product presentations to both internal sales teams and key strategic accounts. You will also develop strong footwear product knowledge through hands‑on learning, exposure to the full merchandising process, and direct coaching from industry experts, equipping you with the confidence and skills needed to grow within the footwear and fashion industry. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260205-0011

jobs.title: Legal Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Legal Intern for VF EMEA Legal Department. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you ready to be introduced to the multifaceted world of corporate law within the retail industry in the EMEA region? VF is looking for a Legal Intern to join the Wholesale Business Area of the EMEA Legal Team based in Stabio, Switzerland. As a Legal Intern you will be offered a real-world exposure to in-house legal operations, including contract drafting and review and compliance checks. You will apply your academic knowledge in real-world legal challenges, promoting the synthesis of classroom teachings with practical experiences. You will work closely with legal professionals, expanding your professional network and understanding the importance of team dynamics in legal settings. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Legal Intern: - Performing legal research activities, including the review, study and analysis of relevant legislation, regulations and case law across the EMEA region. - Draft, review and negotiate various contracts (e.g. Partnership Stores Agreements, Distributorship Agreements, etc.), ensuring they align with VF Corporation’s interests and legal standards. - Assist other legal professionals in handling actual cases, observing and contributing to the resolution process. - Provide support to the team in the management, organization, and maintenance of archived documents and contracts. How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You are studying Law while beginning the internship or you have recently graduated in Law (after May 1st, 2026). - You are fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills. - You have curious mindset with passion for working with people. - You are eager to learn and face up new challenges. - First experiences such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered a plus. What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Legal Landscape of the Retail Industry: insights into the specific legal challenges and regulations. - Contract Drafting and Review: handling real contract negotiations and learning the art of compromise without compromising the company’s interests. - Stakeholder Engagement: the importance and methods of effectively communicating legal insights to non-legal stakeholders within the corporation. - Enhanced Professional Network: building relationships with legal professionals and leaders in the retail industry. - Applied Problem Solving: transitioning from theoretical knowledge to practical application in real-world business scenarios. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260218-0012

descriptionByLocale.fr: Soyez un rêveur, faites la différence ! Rejoignez le #VFInternshipProgram au siège EMEA à Stabio, en Suisse, en tant que Legal Intern pour le département juridique EMEA de VF. À propos de VF VF redéfinit ce que signifie être la meilleure entreprise mondiale de vêtements, chaussures et équipements, propulsant des marques de style de vie actif emblématiques comme The North Face®, Vans® et Timberland®. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com . Informations clés - Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire mensuel brut : 1 850 CHF - Lieu : Siège EMEA de VF à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement simplifié : 3 entretiens (Recruteur, Responsable du recrutement, potentiel Business Case) Conditions d'éligibilité - Vous devez être diplômé(e) après le 1er mai 2026 OU avoir le statut d'étudiant(e) en juin 2026 - Vous devez être citoyen(ne) de l'UE ou de l'EEE (Espace économique européen) Parlons du poste ! Êtes-vous prêt(e) à découvrir le monde multifacette du droit des entreprises dans le secteur du commerce de détail dans la région EMEA ? VF recherche un(e) Legal Intern pour rejoindre la division Wholesale Business Area de l'équipe juridique EMEA basée à Stabio, en Suisse. En tant que Legal Intern, vous bénéficierez d'une exposition concrète aux opérations juridiques internes, notamment la rédaction et la révision de contrats ainsi que les vérifications de conformité. Vous appliquerez vos connaissances académiques à de véritables défis juridiques, favorisant la synthèse entre les enseignements théoriques et les expériences pratiques. Vous travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec des professionnels du droit, développant votre réseau professionnel et comprenant l'importance de la dynamique d'équipe dans les environnements juridiques. Préparez-vous à avoir un impact ! Voici vos responsabilités en rejoignant notre équipe en tant que Legal Intern : - Effectuer des recherches juridiques, notamment la révision, l'étude et l'analyse des législations, réglementations et jurisprudences pertinentes dans la région EMEA. - Rédiger, réviser et négocier divers contrats (ex. : Accords de magasins partenaires, Accords de distribution, etc.), en veillant à leur conformité avec les intérêts et les normes juridiques de VF Corporation. - Assister les autres professionnels juridiques dans le traitement de dossiers réels, en observant et en contribuant au processus de résolution. - Apporter un soutien à l'équipe dans la gestion, l'organisation et la maintenance des documents et contrats archivés. Comment vous ferez la différence Compétences qui vous permettront de réussir : - Vous êtes étudiant(e) en droit au début du stage ou vous avez récemment obtenu un diplôme en droit (après le 1er mai 2026). - Vous maîtrisez l'anglais avec d'excellentes compétences de communication verbale et écrite. - Vous avez un esprit curieux et une passion pour le travail avec les gens. - Vous êtes désireux(se) d'apprendre et de relever de nouveaux défis. - Des premières expériences comme d'autres stages ou activités parascolaires sont un atout. Ce que vous y gagnez À la fin du stage, vous aurez une compréhension claire des points suivants : - Environnement juridique du secteur du commerce de détail : aperçu des défis et réglementations juridiques spécifiques. - Rédaction et révision de contrats : gestion de vraies négociations contractuelles et apprentissage de l'art du compromis sans compromettre les intérêts de l'entreprise. - Engagement des parties prenantes : l'importance et les méthodes de communication efficace des enjeux juridiques aux parties prenantes non juridiques. - Réseau professionnel élargi : développer des relations avec des professionnels et des dirigeants du secteur du commerce de détail. - Résolution de problèmes appliquée : passage des connaissances théoriques à l'application pratique dans des scénarios commerciaux réels. Le programme de stage EMEA de VF est un parcours de 12 mois conçu pour développer et responsabiliser les talents émergents en début de carrière. Nous nous engageons à libérer votre potentiel ; vous pouvez donc vous attendre à un parcours d'apprentissage structuré et à une expérience pratique enrichissante, incluant : - Des ateliers dédiés au développement des compétences et un projet de groupe de conseil interne - Une journée de travail en magasin pour acquérir des informations concrètes sur nos marques - Des opportunités de réseautage avec des pairs et des cadres supérieurs Nous ne pouvons pas garantir que le stage débouchera sur un contrat, mais grâce à la valeur de l'expérience, la plupart de nos stagiaires restent dans l'entreprise après la période de stage. Pour que vous puissiez vous concentrer sur ce qui compte, nous offrons des avantages complets qui favorisent le bien-être mental, physique et financier. Vous profiterez de : - Politique de travail hybride - 50 % de réduction sur les marques VF - Salle de sport sur site, proposant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être - Cantine subventionnée, ainsi que des espaces de détente offrant des boissons gratuites - Navette pour le bureau ou réduction sur les transports en commun, selon votre lieu de résidence - Une communauté de stagiaires dynamique, composée de personnes de divers horizons, styles de vie et nationalités qui aiment travailler ensemble. Libre d'être soi, inclusion et appartenance En tant qu'employeur garantissant l'égalité des chances, nous nous efforçons de favoriser une culture d'appartenance fondée sur le respect, la connexion, l'ouverture et l'authenticité. Nous nous engageons à construire et maintenir un environnement de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos collaborateurs, leur permettant d'être eux-mêmes au travail chaque jour. Vous êtes partant(e) ? Postulez dès maintenant – postuler tôt augmente vos chances ! #readytoapply R-20260218-0012

jobs.title: Internal Audit Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Internal Audit Intern for VF Corporation. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Join an electric, evolving and growing team to support VF business both with assurance and advisory projects. Add value with your experience in improving VF processes and enriching Internal Audit program and department. Support your team members with the projects included in annual Internal Audit Plan and in the SOx program, push boundaries with new ideas, approached and proposals. Be proactive and ask, learn, challenge the status quo. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Internal Audit Intern: - Participate in person in delivering Internal audits, Sox related reviews and advisory projects both with reference to internal and external resources. - Confirm and complete the scope of the audit/review with the relevant owner or audit liaison. - Collaborate in creating or evolving audit programs, conduct the audit/review and participate in the report issuance for financial, operational, IT, Supply Chain or HR related audits and advisory projects. - Prepare the working papers ensuring that the audit objectives are met, and evidence supports the findings. - Prepare reports of findings and recommendations and present to Management. How you will make a difference We all have unique skills that we bring to work and celebrate every day. For this role, there are foundation skills you’ll need to succeed and excel: - Minimum of a Bachelor’s in one of the following fields of concentration – Accounting, Finance, Business, Data Analytics, IT/Information Security/Cyber Security, Supply Chain Management or similar - Certification preferred which may include CPA, CISA, CIA, and/or CFE - Technologically proficiency (i.e., Excel and PowerPoint required, Power BI preferred, any other Data Analytics tool is a plus) - Sense of urgency and strong organizational skills - Bring new ideas and challenge the status quo Skills that will make you succeed: - Strong presentation, verbal, and written skills - Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and problem solving - Strong verbal and written English skills, additional languages a plus - Great team working attitude and open mildness What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Meaningful projects work that drives business impact - Wide range of processes, from Finance to Supply Chain, IT and Operations - Regulatory requirements in different fields (Ex: SOx; CRSD; ISO9001 etc) - An holistic and eclectic way of collaborate and working with business leaders - How priorities are managed in a growing and evolving Internal Audit group The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0013
