For this role, there are foundation skills you’ll need to succeed and excel: - Minimum of a Bachelor’s in one of the following fields of concentration – Accounting, Finance, Business, Data Analytics, IT/Information Security/Cyber Security, Supply Chain Management or similar - Certification preferred which may include CPA, CISA, CIA, and/or CFE - Technologically proficiency (i.e., Excel and PowerPoint required, Power BI preferred, any other Data Analytics tool is a plus) - Sense of urgency and strong organizational skills - Bring new ideas and challenge the status quo Skills that will make you succeed: - Strong presentation, verbal, and written skills - Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and problem solving - Strong verbal and written English skills, additional languages a plus - Great team working attitude and open mildness What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Meaningful projects work that drives business impact - Wide range of processes, from Finance to Supply Chain, IT and Operations - Regulatory requirements in different fields (Ex: SOx; CRSD; ISO9001 etc) - An holistic and eclectic way of collaborate and working with business leaders - How priorities are managed in a growing and evolving Internal Audit group The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0013
descriptionByLocale.it: Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #VFInternshipProgram presso il nostro quartier generale EMEA a Stabio, in Svizzera, come Internal Audit Intern per VF Corporation. Chi è VF VF sta ridefinendo il significato di essere la migliore azienda mondiale di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature, alimentando marchi iconici di stile di vita attivo tra cui The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com . Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1° giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, tempo pieno - Stipendio mensile lordo: 1.850 CHF - Luogo: Sede EMEA di VF a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di selezione semplificato: 3 colloqui (Recruiter, Responsabile assunzioni, potenziale Business Case) Requisiti di idoneità - Devi laurearti dopo il 1° maggio 2026 OPPURE avere lo status di studente a giugno 2026 - Devi essere cittadino UE o SEE (Spazio Economico Europeo) Parliamo del ruolo! Unisciti a un team dinamico, in evoluzione e in crescita per supportare il business di VF con progetti di assurance e advisory. Aggiungi valore con la tua esperienza nel miglioramento dei processi VF e nell'arricchimento del programma e del dipartimento di Internal Audit. Supporta i tuoi colleghi nei progetti inclusi nel piano annuale di Internal Audit e nel programma SOx, spingi oltre i limiti con nuove idee, approcci e proposte. Sii proattivo, chiedi, impara, metti in discussione lo status quo. Preparati ad avere un impatto! Ecco di cosa sarai responsabile entrando nel nostro team come Internal Audit Intern: - Partecipare di persona all'erogazione di audit interni, revisioni legate a SOx e progetti advisory, sia con riferimento a risorse interne che esterne. - Confermare e completare il perimetro dell'audit/revisione con il responsabile competente o il referente di audit. - Collaborare alla creazione o all'evoluzione dei programmi di audit, condurre l'audit/revisione e partecipare all'emissione del report per audit e progetti advisory finanziari, operativi, IT, Supply Chain o HR. - Preparare i documenti di lavoro assicurando che gli obiettivi dell'audit siano raggiunti e che le evidenze supportino i risultati. - Preparare relazioni sui risultati e sulle raccomandazioni e presentarle al Management. Come farai la differenza Tutti abbiamo competenze uniche che portiamo al lavoro e celebriamo ogni giorno. Per questo ruolo, ci sono competenze fondamentali necessarie per avere successo: - Minimo una laurea triennale in uno dei seguenti campi: Contabilità, Finanza, Business, Data Analytics, IT/Sicurezza informatica/Cybersecurity, Supply Chain Management o simili - Preferita una certificazione tra CPA, CISA, CIA e/o CFE - Competenza tecnologica (Excel e PowerPoint richiesti, Power BI preferito, qualsiasi altro strumento di Data Analytics è un plus) - Senso dell'urgenza e forti capacità organizzative - Portare nuove idee e mettere in discussione lo status quo Competenze che ti faranno avere successo: - Forti capacità di presentazione, comunicazione verbale e scritta - Forte pensiero analitico, attenzione ai dettagli e problem solving - Forti competenze in inglese scritto e parlato, lingue aggiuntive sono un plus - Ottima attitudine al lavoro di squadra e apertura mentale Cosa otterrai Al termine del periodo di stage, potrai acquisire una chiara comprensione di quanto segue: - Lavoro su progetti significativi che genera impatto sul business - Ampia gamma di processi, dalla Finanza alla Supply Chain, IT e Operations - Requisiti normativi in diversi ambiti (es.: SOx; CSRD; ISO9001 ecc.) - Un modo olistico ed eclettico di collaborare e lavorare con i leader aziendali - Come le priorità vengono gestite in un gruppo di Internal Audit in crescita ed evoluzione Il programma di stage EMEA di VF è un percorso di 12 mesi progettato per sviluppare e responsabilizzare i talenti emergenti all'inizio della loro carriera. Ci impegniamo a liberare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e una ricca esperienza pratica, tra cui: - Workshop dedicati allo sviluppo delle competenze e progetto di gruppo di consulenza interna - Una giornata di lavoro in negozio per acquisire informazioni reali sui nostri brand - Opportunità di networking con colleghi e leadership senior Non possiamo garantire che lo stage porterà a un contratto in seguito, ma grazie al valore dell'esperienza la maggior parte dei nostri stagisti rimane in azienda dopo il periodo di stage. Per permetterti di concentrarti su ciò che conta, offriamo benefit completi che favoriscono il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario. Potrai godere di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - Sconto del 50% sui brand VF - Palestra in sede con iniziative per la salute e il benessere - Mensa sovvenzionata e aree relax con bevande gratuite - Navetta per l'ufficio o sconto sui trasporti pubblici, a seconda della tua ubicazione - Una vivace comunità di stagisti, con persone di diversi background, stili di vita e nazionalità che amano lavorare insieme. Liberi di essere, Inclusione e Appartenenza In quanto datore di lavoro che garantisce pari opportunità, ci impegniamo a promuovere una cultura di appartenenza basata su rispetto, connessione, apertura e autenticità. Ci impegniamo a costruire e mantenere un ambiente di lavoro che celebri la diversità dei nostri collaboratori, consentendo loro di essere autentici ogni giorno. Sei pronto? Candidati ora – candidarsi presto aumenta le tue possibilità! #readytoapply R-20260209-0013
descriptionByLocale.de: Sei ein Träumer, mach den Unterschied! Tritt dem #VFInternshipProgram in unserem EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz, als Internal Audit Intern für VF Corporation bei. Über VF VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, das beste Bekleidungs-, Schuhwerk- und Ausrüstungsunternehmen der Welt zu sein, und treibt ikonische Lifestyle-Marken wie The North Face®, Vans® und Timberland® voran. Erfahre mehr unter http://vfc.com . Wichtige Informationen - Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Bruttomonatsgehalt: 1.850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz - Optimierter Bewerbungsprozess: 3 Interviews (Recruiter, Einstellungsmanager, möglicher Business Case) Eignungsvoraussetzungen - Du musst nach dem 1. Mai 2026 deinen Abschluss machen ODER du musst im Juni 2026 Studentenstatus haben - Du musst die EU- oder EWR-Staatsbürgerschaft (Europäischer Wirtschaftsraum) besitzen Sprechen wir über die Stelle! Tritt einem dynamischen, sich entwickelnden und wachsenden Team bei, um das VF-Geschäft sowohl mit Assurance- als auch Advisory-Projekten zu unterstützen. Bringe deinen Mehrwert durch deine Erfahrung bei der Verbesserung von VF-Prozessen und der Bereicherung des Internal Audit-Programms und der Abteilung ein. Unterstütze deine Teamkollegen bei den im jährlichen Internal Audit-Plan und im SOx-Programm enthaltenen Projekten, erweitere Grenzen mit neuen Ideen, Ansätzen und Vorschlägen. Sei proaktiv, frage, lerne, stelle den Status quo in Frage. Mach dich bereit, einen Einfluss zu haben! Hier ist, wofür du als Internal Audit Intern in unserem Team verantwortlich sein wirst: - Persönliche Teilnahme an der Durchführung interner Audits, SOx-bezogener Prüfungen und Advisory-Projekten, sowohl mit Bezug auf interne als auch externe Ressourcen. - Bestätigung und Vervollständigung des Umfangs des Audits/der Prüfung mit dem zuständigen Verantwortlichen oder Audit-Verbindungsglied. - Mitarbeit bei der Erstellung oder Weiterentwicklung von Audit-Programmen, Durchführung des Audits/der Prüfung und Mitwirkung bei der Berichterstellung für finanzielle, operative, IT-, Supply-Chain- oder HR-bezogene Audits und Advisory-Projekte. - Vorbereitung der Arbeitspapiere, um sicherzustellen, dass die Audit-Ziele erreicht werden und Belege die Ergebnisse stützen. - Erstellen von Berichten über Ergebnisse und Empfehlungen und Vorlage an das Management. Wie du den Unterschied machst Wir alle haben einzigartige Fähigkeiten, die wir bei der Arbeit einbringen und jeden Tag feiern. Für diese Rolle gibt es grundlegende Fähigkeiten, die du brauchst, um erfolgreich zu sein: - Mindestens ein Bachelor in einem der folgenden Bereiche: Rechnungswesen, Finanzen, Business, Datenanalyse, IT/Informationssicherheit/Cybersicherheit, Supply Chain Management oder ähnlichem - Bevorzugte Zertifizierungen: CPA, CISA, CIA und/oder CFE - Technologische Kompetenz (Excel und PowerPoint erforderlich, Power BI bevorzugt, jedes andere Datenanalyse-Tool ist ein Plus) - Dringlichkeitsgefühl und starke Organisationsfähigkeiten - Neue Ideen einbringen und den Status quo hinterfragen Fähigkeiten, die dich erfolgreich machen: - Starke Präsentations-, Verbal- und Schreibfähigkeiten - Starkes analytisches Denken, Detailgenauigkeit und Problemlösung - Starke mündliche und schriftliche Englischkenntnisse, zusätzliche Sprachen sind ein Plus - Ausgezeichnete Teamarbeitshaltung und Aufgeschlossenheit Was du dafür bekommst Am Ende des Praktikumszeitraums kannst du folgendes klar verstehen: - Sinnvolle Projektarbeit, die Geschäftsauswirkungen hat - Breites Spektrum an Prozessen, von Finanzen über Supply Chain, IT und Operations - Regulatorische Anforderungen in verschiedenen Bereichen (z.B.: SOx; CSRD; ISO9001 etc.) - Eine ganzheitliche und vielseitige Art zu kollaborieren und mit Führungskräften zu arbeiten - Wie Prioritäten in einer wachsenden und sich weiterentwickelnden Internal Audit-Gruppe gemanagt werden Das VF EMEA-Praktikumsprogramm ist eine 12-monatige Reise, die darauf ausgelegt ist, aufstrebende Talente am Beginn ihrer Karriere zu entwickeln und zu stärken. Wir verpflichten uns, dein Potenzial zu entfalten, so dass du einen strukturierten Lernpfad und eine reichhaltige praktische Erfahrung erwarten kannst, einschließlich: - Dedizierte Kompetenzentwicklungs-Workshops und internes Beratungsgruppenprojekt - Ein Arbeitstag im Laden, um echte Einblicke in unsere Marken zu gewinnen - Networking-Möglichkeiten mit Gleichaltrigen und Senior Leadership Wir können nicht garantieren, dass das Praktikum danach zu einem Vertrag führt, aber dank des Wertes der Erfahrung bleiben die meisten unserer Praktikanten nach der Praktikumszeit im Unternehmen. Da wir möchten, dass du dich auf das Wesentliche konzentrierst, bieten wir umfassende Leistungen, die das mentale, physische und finanzielle Wohlbefinden fördern. Du wirst genießen: - Hybride Arbeitspolitik - 50% Rabatt auf VF-Marken - Fitnessstudio vor Ort mit Gesundheits- und Wellnessinitiativen - Subventionierte Kantine sowie Pausenräume mit kostenlosen Getränken - Shuttlebus zum Büro oder Rabatt auf öffentliche Verkehrsmittel, je nach deinem Wohnort - Eine lebhafte Praktikantengemeinschaft mit Menschen verschiedener Hintergründe, Lebensstile und Nationalitäten, die gerne zusammenarbeiten. Frei zu sein, Inklusion & Zugehörigkeit Als gleichberechtigter Arbeitgeber streben wir danach, eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit zu fördern, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir verpflichten uns, einen Arbeitsplatz aufzubauen und zu erhalten, der die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeiter feiert und ihnen ermöglicht, jeden Tag ihr authentisches Selbst zur Arbeit zu bringen. Bist du dabei? Bewirb dich jetzt – frühzeitige Bewerbung erhöht deine Chancen! #readytoapply R-20260209-0013
descriptionByLocale.fr: Soyez un rêveur, faites la différence ! Rejoignez le #VFInternshipProgram au siège EMEA à Stabio, en Suisse, en tant qu'Internal Audit Intern pour VF Corporation. À propos de VF VF redéfinit ce que signifie être la meilleure entreprise mondiale de vêtements, chaussures et équipements, propulsant des marques de style de vie actif emblématiques comme The North Face®, Vans® et Timberland®. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com . Informations clés - Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire mensuel brut : 1 850 CHF - Lieu : Siège EMEA de VF à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement simplifié : 3 entretiens (Recruteur, Responsable du recrutement, potentiel Business Case) Conditions d'éligibilité - Vous devez être diplômé(e) après le 1er mai 2026 OU avoir le statut d'étudiant(e) en juin 2026 - Vous devez être citoyen(ne) de l'UE ou de l'EEE (Espace économique européen) Parlons du poste ! Rejoignez une équipe dynamique, en évolution et en croissance pour soutenir les activités de VF avec des projets d'assurance et de conseil. Apportez de la valeur avec votre expérience dans l'amélioration des processus VF et l'enrichissement du programme et du département d'Audit Interne. Soutenez vos collègues dans les projets inclus dans le plan annuel d'Audit Interne et dans le programme SOx, repoussez les limites avec de nouvelles idées, approches et propositions. Soyez proactif(ve), posez des questions, apprenez, remettez en question le statu quo. Préparez-vous à avoir un impact ! Voici vos responsabilités en rejoignant notre équipe en tant qu'Internal Audit Intern : - Participer en personne à la réalisation d'audits internes, de revues liées à SOx et de projets advisory, en référence à des ressources internes et externes. - Confirmer et compléter le périmètre de l'audit/revue avec le responsable concerné ou le correspondant d'audit. - Collaborer à la création ou à l'évolution des programmes d'audit, mener l'audit/revue et participer à l'émission du rapport pour les audits et projets advisory financiers, opérationnels, IT, Supply Chain ou RH. - Préparer les documents de travail en veillant à ce que les objectifs d'audit soient atteints et que les preuves soutiennent les conclusions. - Préparer des rapports de conclusions et de recommandations et les présenter à la Direction. Comment vous ferez la différence Nous avons tous des compétences uniques que nous apportons au travail et célébrons chaque jour. Pour ce rôle, il y a des compétences fondamentales dont vous aurez besoin pour réussir : - Minimum un Bachelor dans l'un des domaines suivants : Comptabilité, Finance, Business, Data Analytics, IT/Sécurité informatique/Cybersécurité, Gestion de la Supply Chain ou similaire - Certification de préférence parmi CPA, CISA, CIA et/ou CFE - Maîtrise technologique (Excel et PowerPoint requis, Power BI préféré, tout autre outil d'analyse de données est un plus) - Sens de l'urgence et solides compétences organisationnelles - Apporter de nouvelles idées et remettre en question le statu quo Compétences qui vous permettront de réussir : - Solides compétences en présentation, communication verbale et écrite - Fort esprit analytique, souci du détail et résolution de problèmes - Solides compétences en anglais oral et écrit, langues supplémentaires appréciées - Excellente aptitude au travail en équipe et ouverture d'esprit Ce que vous y gagnez À la fin du stage, vous aurez une compréhension claire des points suivants : - Travail sur des projets significatifs qui génèrent un impact sur l'activité - Large éventail de processus, de la Finance à la Supply Chain, IT et Operations - Exigences réglementaires dans différents domaines (ex. : SOx ; CSRD ; ISO9001 etc.) - Une façon holistique et éclectique de collaborer et de travailler avec les dirigeants - Comment les priorités sont gérées dans un groupe d'Audit Interne en croissance et en évolution Le programme de stage EMEA de VF est un parcours de 12 mois conçu pour développer et responsabiliser les talents émergents en début de carrière. Nous nous engageons à libérer votre potentiel ; vous pouvez donc vous attendre à un parcours d'apprentissage structuré et à une expérience pratique enrichissante, incluant : - Des ateliers dédiés au développement des compétences et un projet de groupe de conseil interne - Une journée de travail en magasin pour acquérir des informations concrètes sur nos marques - Des opportunités de réseautage avec des pairs et des cadres supérieurs Nous ne pouvons pas garantir que le stage débouchera sur un contrat, mais grâce à la valeur de l'expérience, la plupart de nos stagiaires restent dans l'entreprise après la période de stage. Pour que vous puissiez vous concentrer sur ce qui compte, nous offrons des avantages complets qui favorisent le bien-être mental, physique et financier. Vous profiterez de : - Politique de travail hybride - 50 % de réduction sur les marques VF - Salle de sport sur site avec initiatives de santé et de bien-être - Cantine subventionnée et espaces de détente avec boissons gratuites - Navette pour le bureau ou réduction sur les transports en commun, selon votre lieu de résidence - Une communauté de stagiaires dynamique, composée de personnes de divers horizons, styles de vie et nationalités qui aiment travailler ensemble. Libre d'être soi, inclusion et appartenance En tant qu'employeur garantissant l'égalité des chances, nous nous efforçons de favoriser une culture d'appartenance fondée sur le respect, la connexion, l'ouverture et l'authenticité. Nous nous engageons à construire et maintenir un environnement de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos collaborateurs. Vous êtes partant(e) ? Postulez dès maintenant – postuler tôt augmente vos chances ! #readytoapply R-20260209-0013

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Napapijri. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Napapijri is looking for an exceptional Allocator Intern to join our DTC (Direct To Consumer) team based in Stabio, Switzerland. As Allocator Intern you will support the development of our Owned & Operated Outlet and Full Price business. You will collaborate closely with the Merchandise Planner, Buyer, and Sales Team to ensure that inventory is managed to the planned constraints and business goals. You will have a direct impact on the day-by-day life of our teams and being accountable for performance monitoring to support informed decision. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Allocator Intern: - Supports Inventory Plans through the execution of initial seasonal inventory allocations and the weekly/daily replenishment activities - Focus on store & Channels inventory levels - STO (Stock Transfer Order ) Management, Shipping delivery Schedule, Delivery Plans, back to DC management (in season and end of season) arranging pick-up with local couriers - Performance & stock analysis to support planning team - Contribute to historical data analysis, inventory and communication set up and results monitoring during Key Centre activations - Contribute to properly set up promotions in the system - Contribute to keep a constant communication flow with key stakeholders (Field, sales team,..) How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - A University Bachelor or Master’s degree in Economic, Statistic, or related fields is required as a pre-requisite - Strong analytical skills and knowledge. Previous experience in retail planning and/or allocation is preferred. - Advantage knowledge of Microsoft Excel. Ability to create reports that meet business needs and data-visualization dashboards - Ability to analyse, present and communicate information in a manner that allows informed decision-making - Trading mentality: ability to work in team maximising communication between different functions, challenge results and information to identify challenges, drive for results and be profit-focused. - You are fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Consolidation of your analytical skills (improving trading capabilities & performance analysis) - Manage a full allocation process from order creation to stock management - Promotion planning & management (In Season & End of Season) - Work in a dynamic DTC environment with an agile and adaptable team The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260218-0006

descriptionByLocale.en: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for a Allocator intern to join VANS within VF EMEA Internship Program. In this role, you will provide support to the Allocation Team: - By taking an active role in analysing performance and sales trend. - Monitoring deliveries, maintaining adequate stock levels. - Taking care of replenishment / initial allocation for O&O EMEA Stores. - Developing and maintaining reports and tools finding the best way to make them efficient and useful for the team. How you will make a difference You should be an analytical, resilient and curious team player, being: - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills. - Passionate for numbers with strong analytical skills: accuracy and attention to details is a must. - Proficient in Microsoft Excel. Knowledge of any BI platform will be considered as a plus (eg: Power BI). - Eager to learn and face up new challenges. - Proactive in order to achieve yours and your team goals. - First experiences such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Learn about Vans’ trends and main logics of Retail Merchandising. - Learn logics of inventory management, sales analysis, and allocation strategies. - Learn to work with a wide team of internal stakeholder. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007
descriptionByLocale.it: Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #VFInternshipProgram presso il nostro quartier generale EMEA a Stabio, in Svizzera, come Allocator Intern per Vans. Chi è VF VF sta ridefinendo il significato di essere la migliore azienda mondiale di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature, alimentando marchi iconici di stile di vita attivo tra cui The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com . Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1° giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, tempo pieno - Stipendio mensile lordo: 1.850 CHF - Luogo: Sede EMEA di VF a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di selezione semplificato: 3 colloqui (Recruiter, Responsabile assunzioni, potenziale Business Case) Requisiti di idoneità - Devi laurearti dopo il 1° maggio 2026 OPPURE avere lo status di studente a giugno 2026 - Devi essere cittadino UE o SEE (Spazio Economico Europeo) Parliamo del ruolo! Siamo alla ricerca di uno stagista Allocator per unirsi a VANS nell'ambito del programma di stage EMEA di VF. In questo ruolo, fornirai supporto al team di Allocazione: - Assumendo un ruolo attivo nell'analisi delle performance e delle tendenze di vendita. - Monitorando le consegne e mantenendo livelli di stock adeguati. - Occupandoti del rifornimento/allocazione iniziale per i negozi O&O EMEA. - Sviluppando e mantenendo report e strumenti per renderli efficienti e utili per il team. Come farai la differenza Dovresti essere un team player analitico, resiliente e curioso, con: - Fluenza in inglese con eccellenti capacità di comunicazione verbale e scritta. - Passione per i numeri con forti capacità analitiche: precisione e attenzione ai dettagli sono fondamentali. - Competenza in Microsoft Excel. La conoscenza di qualsiasi piattaforma BI sarà considerata un plus (es.: Power BI). - Voglia di imparare e affrontare nuove sfide. - Proattività per raggiungere i tuoi obiettivi e quelli del team. - Esperienze precedenti come altri stage o attività extracurriculari sono considerate un plus. Cosa otterrai Al termine del periodo di stage, potrai acquisire una chiara comprensione di quanto segue: - Imparare le tendenze di Vans e le principali logiche del Retail Merchandising. - Imparare le logiche di gestione dell'inventario, analisi delle vendite e strategie di allocazione. - Imparare a lavorare con un ampio team di stakeholder interni. Il programma di stage EMEA di VF è un percorso di 12 mesi progettato per sviluppare e responsabilizzare i talenti emergenti all'inizio della loro carriera. Ci impegniamo a liberare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e una ricca esperienza pratica, tra cui: - Workshop dedicati allo sviluppo delle competenze e progetto di gruppo di consulenza interna - Una giornata di lavoro in negozio per acquisire informazioni reali sui nostri brand - Opportunità di networking con colleghi e leadership senior Non possiamo garantire che lo stage porterà a un contratto in seguito, ma grazie al valore dell'esperienza la maggior parte dei nostri stagisti rimane in azienda dopo il periodo di stage. Per permetterti di concentrarti su ciò che conta, offriamo benefit completi che favoriscono il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario. Potrai godere di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - Sconto del 50% sui brand VF - Palestra in sede con iniziative per la salute e il benessere - Mensa sovvenzionata e aree relax con bevande gratuite - Navetta per l'ufficio o sconto sui trasporti pubblici, a seconda della tua ubicazione - Una vivace comunità di stagisti, con persone di diversi background, stili di vita e nazionalità che amano lavorare insieme. Liberi di essere, Inclusione e Appartenenza In quanto datore di lavoro che garantisce pari opportunità, ci impegniamo a promuovere una cultura di appartenenza basata su rispetto, connessione, apertura e autenticità. Sei pronto? Candidati ora – candidarsi presto aumenta le tue possibilità! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007
descriptionByLocale.de: Sei ein Träumer, mach den Unterschied! Tritt dem #VFInternshipProgram in unserem EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz, als Allocator Intern für Vans bei. Über VF VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, das beste Bekleidungs-, Schuhwerk- und Ausrüstungsunternehmen der Welt zu sein, und treibt ikonische Lifestyle-Marken wie The North Face®, Vans® und Timberland® voran. Erfahre mehr unter http://vfc.com . Wichtige Informationen - Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Bruttomonatsgehalt: 1.850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz - Optimierter Bewerbungsprozess: 3 Interviews (Recruiter, Einstellungsmanager, möglicher Business Case) Eignungsvoraussetzungen - Du musst nach dem 1. Mai 2026 deinen Abschluss machen ODER im Juni 2026 Studentenstatus haben - Du musst die EU- oder EWR-Staatsbürgerschaft besitzen Sprechen wir über die Stelle! Wir suchen einen Allocator Intern, der VANS im Rahmen des VF EMEA Internship Program begleitet. In dieser Rolle wirst du das Allocation-Team unterstützen: - Indem du eine aktive Rolle bei der Analyse von Performance und Verkaufstrends übernimmst. - Lieferungen überwachst und angemessene Lagerbestände aufrechterhältst. - Dich um Nachlieferung/Erstallokation für O&O EMEA Stores kümmerst. - Berichte und Tools entwickelst und pflegst, um sie für das Team so effizient und nützlich wie möglich zu machen. Wie du den Unterschied machst Du solltest ein analytischer, belastbarer und neugieriger Teamplayer sein: - Fließend in Englisch mit ausgezeichneten verbalen und schriftlichen Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. - Begeistert von Zahlen mit starken analytischen Fähigkeiten: Genauigkeit und Liebe zum Detail sind ein Muss. - Versiert in Microsoft Excel. Kenntnisse einer BI-Plattform werden als Plus angesehen (z.B.: Power BI). - Wissbegierig und bereit, neue Herausforderungen anzunehmen. - Proaktiv, um deine und die Teamziele zu erreichen. - Erste Erfahrungen wie andere Praktika oder außerschulische Aktivitäten werden als Plus angesehen. Was du dafür bekommst Am Ende des Praktikumszeitraums kannst du folgendes klar verstehen: - Lernen über Vans' Trends und wichtigste Logiken des Retail Merchandising. - Logiken der Bestandsverwaltung, Verkaufsanalyse und Allokationsstrategien erlernen. - Lernen, mit einem breiten Team interner Stakeholder zu arbeiten. Das VF EMEA-Praktikumsprogramm ist eine 12-monatige Reise zur Entwicklung aufstrebender Talente. Wir bieten: - Dedizierte Kompetenzentwicklungs-Workshops und internes Beratungsgruppenprojekt - Ein Arbeitstag im Laden für echte Markeneinblicke - Networking-Möglichkeiten mit Gleichaltrigen und Senior Leadership Außerdem genießt du: - Hybride Arbeitspolitik - 50% Rabatt auf VF-Marken - Fitnessstudio vor Ort - Subventionierte Kantine und Pausenräume mit kostenlosen Getränken - Shuttlebus oder Rabatt auf öffentliche Verkehrsmittel - Eine lebhafte Praktikantengemeinschaft. Bist du dabei? Bewirb dich jetzt! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007
descriptionByLocale.fr: Soyez un rêveur, faites la différence ! Rejoignez le #VFInternshipProgram au siège EMEA à Stabio, en Suisse, en tant qu'Allocator Intern pour Vans. À propos de VF VF redéfinit ce que signifie être la meilleure entreprise mondiale de vêtements, chaussures et équipements, propulsant des marques de style de vie actif emblématiques comme The North Face®, Vans® et Timberland®. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com . Informations clés - Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire mensuel brut : 1 850 CHF - Lieu : Siège EMEA de VF à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement simplifié : 3 entretiens (Recruteur, Responsable du recrutement, potentiel Business Case) Conditions d'éligibilité - Vous devez être diplômé(e) après le 1er mai 2026 OU avoir le statut d'étudiant(e) en juin 2026 - Vous devez être citoyen(ne) de l'UE ou de l'EEE Parlons du poste ! Nous recherchons un(e) stagiaire Allocator pour rejoindre VANS dans le cadre du programme de stage EMEA de VF. Dans ce rôle, vous apporterez votre soutien à l'équipe d'Allocation : - En prenant un rôle actif dans l'analyse des performances et des tendances de ventes. - En surveillant les livraisons et en maintenant des niveaux de stock adéquats. - En vous occupant du réapprovisionnement/de l'allocation initiale pour les magasins O&O EMEA. - En développant et en maintenant des rapports et des outils pour les rendre efficaces et utiles pour l'équipe. Comment vous ferez la différence Vous devez être un(e) joueur(se) d'équipe analytique, résilient(e) et curieux(se) : - Maîtrisant l'anglais avec d'excellentes compétences de communication verbale et écrite. - Passionné(e) par les chiffres avec de solides compétences analytiques : la précision et l'attention aux détails sont essentielles. - Maîtrisant Microsoft Excel. La connaissance d'une plateforme BI sera considérée comme un plus (ex. : Power BI). - Désireux(se) d'apprendre et de relever de nouveaux défis. - Proactif(ve) pour atteindre vos objectifs et ceux de votre équipe. - Des premières expériences comme d'autres stages ou activités parascolaires sont un atout. Ce que vous y gagnez À la fin du stage, vous aurez une compréhension claire des points suivants : - Apprendre les tendances de Vans et les principales logiques du Retail Merchandising. - Apprendre les logiques de gestion des stocks, l'analyse des ventes et les stratégies d'allocation. - Apprendre à travailler avec une large équipe de parties prenantes internes. Le programme de stage EMEA de VF est un parcours de 12 mois conçu pour développer les talents émergents. Vous profiterez de : - Politique de travail hybride - 50 % de réduction sur les marques VF - Salle de sport sur site - Cantine subventionnée et espaces de détente avec boissons gratuites - Navette ou réduction sur les transports en commun - Une communauté de stagiaires dynamique. Vous êtes partant(e) ? Postulez dès maintenant ! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Sales Intern for Smartwool & icebreaker. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Ready to help shape how Smartwool & Icebreaker show up across Zalando, Amazon, and other digital platforms across EMEA? Join our Digital Platforms team and support two purpose-led, merino-obsessed outdoor brands in growing their presence with key digital partners. Contribute to the daily execution and long‑term evolution of our digital marketplace presence, helping us drive visibility, conversion, and brand excellence across key online partners. Support platform coordination, performance monitoring, and cross-functional collaboration to keep our digital ecosystem running smoothly. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for as a Digital Platforms Intern: - Coordinate daily activities across digital marketplaces and strategic accounts to keep launches, updates, and optimizations on track. - Support initiatives to drive conversion by ensuring products, content, and campaigns land effectively across platforms. - Develop and refine tools, trackers, and processes to help the team monitor performance and unlock new opportunities. - Contribute to relationship‑building with both internal and external partners, helping strengthen collaboration. - Bring fresh ideas to help expand Smartwool & Icebreaker’s presence across digital environments. - Assist with additional projects within the Digital Platforms team as needed. How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You’re fluent in English and comfortable communicating clearly, with the ability to give context so others can easily follow your questions or updates. - You have a solid grasp of Excel fundamentals, including filters, VLOOKUP (or XLOOKUP), pivot tables, and working with large raw datasets. - You enjoy solving problems through data and aren’t afraid to dive into detailed spreadsheets or performance reports. - You bring curiosity, initiative, and the drive to learn quickly in a dynamic, cross‑functional environment. - Early experience through internships, projects, or extracurricular roles shows your ability to take ownership and follow through. A degree is great, but we care most about your mindset, curiosity, and ability to work with data and people in a fast‑moving environment. What’s in it for you In this internship, you’ll discover how two global outdoor merino brands can complement each other in serving different consumers across diverse digital channels - and you’ll be right at the heart of it. By the end of your internship, you can expect to have: - A solid understanding of different digital business models (priorities being Zalando and Amazon, but not only) and how brands win within them. - Experience reading and interpreting performance data to identify risks and opportunities. - Confidence supporting cross-functional teams and digital partners. - Hands-on insight into how we grow brand presence and conversion across multiple platforms. - A deeper appreciation for the world of merino wool—and the values behind Smartwool & Icebreaker. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260204-0004

Chi è VF VF sta ridefinendo il significato di essere la migliore azienda mondiale di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature, alimentando marchi iconici di stile di vita attivo tra cui The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Pronto ad aiutare a definire come Smartwool & Icebreaker si presentano su Zalando, Amazon e altre piattaforme digitali in tutta la regione EMEA? Unisciti al nostro team Digital Platforms e supporta due brand outdoor con una forte missione e una passione per la lana merino, nella crescita della loro presenza con i principali partner digitali. Contribuisci all'esecuzione quotidiana e all'evoluzione a lungo termine della nostra presenza sui marketplace digitali, aiutandoci a guidare visibilità, conversione ed eccellenza del brand presso i principali partner online. Supporta il coordinamento delle piattaforme, il monitoraggio delle performance e la collaborazione interfunzionale per mantenere il nostro ecosistema digitale funzionante senza intoppi. Preparati ad avere un impatto! Ecco di cosa sarai responsabile come Digital Platforms Intern: - Coordinare le attività quotidiane sui marketplace digitali e gli account strategici per mantenere lanci, aggiornamenti e ottimizzazioni nei tempi previsti. - Supportare iniziative per migliorare la conversione assicurando che prodotti, contenuti e campagne vengano implementati efficacemente sulle piattaforme. - Sviluppare e perfezionare strumenti, tracker e processi per aiutare il team a monitorare le performance e cogliere nuove opportunità. - Contribuire alla costruzione di relazioni con partner interni ed esterni, rafforzando la collaborazione. - Portare idee fresche per espandere la presenza di Smartwool & Icebreaker negli ambienti digitali. - Assistere con ulteriori progetti all'interno del team Digital Platforms secondo necessità. Come farai la differenza Competenze che ti faranno avere successo: - Sei fluente in inglese e riesci a comunicare chiaramente, con la capacità di fornire contesto affinché gli altri possano facilmente seguire le tue domande o aggiornamenti. - Hai una solida conoscenza dei fondamentali di Excel, inclusi filtri, VLOOKUP (o XLOOKUP), tabelle pivot e lavoro con grandi dataset grezzi. - Ti piace risolvere problemi attraverso i dati e non hai paura di immergerti in fogli di calcolo dettagliati o report di performance. - Porti curiosità, iniziativa e la determinazione di imparare rapidamente in un ambiente dinamico e interfunzionale. - Una prima esperienza attraverso stage, progetti o attività extracurriculari dimostra la tua capacità di assumerti responsabilità e portare a termine i compiti. Cosa otterrai In questo stage, scoprirai come due brand outdoor globali di lana merino possono complementarsi nel servire consumatori diversi attraverso vari canali digitali. Alla fine dello stage, potrai avere: - Una solida comprensione dei diversi modelli di business digitali (con priorità a Zalando e Amazon, ma non solo) e come i brand si affermano al loro interno. - Esperienza nella lettura e interpretazione dei dati di performance per identificare rischi e opportunità. - Fiducia nel supportare team interfunzionali e partner digitali. - Esperienza pratica su come far crescere la presenza e la conversione del brand su più piattaforme. - Una maggiore comprensione del mondo della lana merino e dei valori di Smartwool & Icebreaker. Il programma di stage EMEA di VF è un percorso di 12 mesi. Fähigkeiten, die dich erfolgreich machen: - Fließend Englisch mit klarer Kommunikation. - Solide Excel-Kenntnisse (Filter, VLOOKUP, Pivot-Tabellen). - Freude an datenbasierter Problemlösung. - Neugier, Initiative und Lernbereitschaft. Was du dafür bekommst Du wirst entdecken, wie zwei globale Merino-Marken verschiedene Verbraucher über digitale Kanäle bedienen können. Am Ende des Praktikums hast du: - Solides Verständnis digitaler Geschäftsmodelle (Schwerpunkt Zalando und Amazon). - Erfahrung in Performance-Datenanalyse. - Sicherheit im Umgang mit funktionsübergreifenden Teams. - Einblicke in Markenwachstum und Konversion auf mehreren Plattformen. Außerdem genießt du: - Hybride Arbeitspolitik - 50% Rabatt auf VF-Marken - Fitnessstudio vor Ort - Subventionierte Kantine - Shuttlebus oder ÖPNV-Rabatt - Eine lebhafte Praktikantengemeinschaft. Bist du dabei? Bewirb dich jetzt! #readytoapply R-20260204-0004

jobs.title: AI & Digital Innovation Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as AI & Digital Innovation Intern for the Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Bring your builder mindset to scale AI across iconic outdoor brands. We’re hiring an AI & Digital Innovation Intern to drive rapid experimentation with tools and workflows that improve digital experiences end - to - end. Drive rapid experimentation across ecommerce by evaluating and testing digital tools, platforms, and workflows that improve brand experiences and team productivity. Collaborate cross functionally with engineering, design, and marketing to pilot solutions, research emerging trends in AI/DXP, and present clear recommendations backed by lightweight experiments and metrics. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as AI & Digital Innovation Intern : - Assist in evaluating and testing new digital tools, platforms, and workflows that improve brand experiences across e-commerce storefronts - Collaborate with engineering, design, and marketing teams to support project delivery and cross-functional communication - Research emerging trends in e-commerce, AI, and digital experience platforms and present findings to the team - Craft and refine prompts & guardrails for internal AI tools to support tasks like content ideation, QA, and consumer insights. - Frame problems into hypotheses and design lightweight experiments (pilots/AB tests, before after studies), define success metrics, and report outcomes with clear narratives. How you will make a difference You’ll make a difference by bringing a entrepreneur mindset—spotting opportunities, trying things quickly, and turning simple ideas into real, measurable improvements. Your curiosity for AI and talent for crafting smart prompts will help our teams experiment faster and unlock new ways of working. Skills that will make you succeed: - Problem framing & experimentation skills —ability to translate ambiguous needs into clear hypotheses, simple test designs, and meaningful, business relevant metrics. - E-commerce and DXP intuition —familiarity with storefront UX, content workflows, CMS/DXP concepts (nice to have, not mandatory). - Storytelling that drives decisions —turn complex tests into crisp narratives, demos, and recommendations for nontechnical stakeholders. - An engineering degree is nice to have, but not required —we care most about your curiosity, projects, and evidence of impact. What’s in it for you In the role of AI & Digital Innovation Intern, you will work side by side with engineering, design, and marketing; learn how decisions travel from strategy to storefront. Gain a front row seat to ecommerce, AI, and DXP trends in a multi - brand environment with global reach. We will support you with ad hoc trainings and networking opportunities across other functions and brands! At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Handson AI in the real world: go from idea to pilot to measurable impact across multiple brands’ ecommerce experiences. - Mentorship & craft growth: guided learning in experimentation, prompt design, and AI product thinking; access to team playbooks and internal training. - Portfolio ready outcomes: ship case studies, prompt libraries, enablement assets, and experiment readouts you can proudly showcase. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260213-0011

descriptionByLocale.it: Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #VFInternshipProgram presso il nostro quartier generale EMEA a Stabio, in Svizzera, come AI & Digital Innovation Intern per il team Digital Technology. Chi è VF VF sta ridefinendo il significato di essere la migliore azienda mondiale di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature, alimentando marchi iconici di stile di vita attivo tra cui The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com . Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1° giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, tempo pieno - Stipendio mensile lordo: 1.850 CHF - Luogo: Sede EMEA di VF a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di selezione semplificato: 3 colloqui (Recruiter, Responsabile assunzioni, potenziale Business Case) Requisiti di idoneità - Devi laurearti dopo il 1° maggio 2026 OPPURE avere lo status di studente a giugno 2026 - Devi essere cittadino UE o SEE (Spazio Economico Europeo) Parliamo del ruolo! Porta la tua mentalità costruttiva per scalare l'AI attraverso i brand outdoor iconici. Stiamo cercando un AI & Digital Innovation Intern per guidare la sperimentazione rapida con strumenti e flussi di lavoro che migliorano le esperienze digitali end-to-end. Guida la sperimentazione rapida nell'e-commerce valutando e testando strumenti digitali, piattaforme e flussi di lavoro che migliorano le esperienze del brand e la produttività del team. Collabora in modo interfunzionale con ingegneria, design e marketing per sperimentare soluzioni, ricercare tendenze emergenti in AI/DXP e presentare raccomandazioni chiare supportate da esperimenti leggeri e metriche. Ecco di cosa sarai responsabile come AI & Digital Innovation Intern: - Assistere nella valutazione e nel test di nuovi strumenti digitali, piattaforme e flussi di lavoro che migliorano le esperienze del brand negli storefront di e-commerce. - Collaborare con i team di ingegneria, design e marketing per supportare la consegna del progetto e la comunicazione interfunzionale. - Ricercare tendenze emergenti nell'e-commerce, nell'AI e nelle piattaforme di esperienza digitale e presentare i risultati al team. - Creare e perfezionare prompt e guardrail per strumenti AI interni a supporto di attività come ideazione di contenuti, QA e consumer insights. - Inquadrare i problemi in ipotesi e progettare esperimenti leggeri (pilota/A/B test, studi before-after), definire metriche di successo e riportare i risultati con narrazioni chiare. Come farai la differenza Farai la differenza portando una mentalità imprenditoriale — cogliendo opportunità, provando rapidamente le cose e trasformando idee semplici in miglioramenti reali e misurabili. Competenze che ti faranno avere successo: - Abilità di inquadramento dei problemi e sperimentazione — capacità di tradurre esigenze ambigue in ipotesi chiare, design di test semplici e metriche rilevanti per il business. - Intuizione e-commerce e DXP — familiarità con UX degli storefront, flussi di lavoro dei contenuti, concetti CMS/DXP (gradito ma non obbligatorio). - Storytelling che guida le decisioni — trasformare test complessi in narrazioni, demo e raccomandazioni concise per stakeholder non tecnici. Cosa otterrai Alla fine del periodo di stage, potrai acquisire una chiara comprensione di quanto segue: - AI pratica nel mondo reale: dall'idea al pilota fino all'impatto misurabile. - Mentorship e crescita professionale: apprendimento guidato nella sperimentazione e nel design dei prompt. - Risultati pronti per il portfolio: case study, librerie di prompt e report sugli esperimenti. Potrai godere di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - Sconto del 50% sui brand VF - Palestra in sede - Mensa sovvenzionata - Navetta o sconto sui trasporti pubblici - Una vivace comunità di stagisti. Sei pronto? Candidati ora! #readytoapply R-20260213-0011
descriptionByLocale.de: Sei ein Träumer, mach den Unterschied! Tritt dem #VFInternshipProgram in unserem EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz, als AI & Digital Innovation Intern für das Digital Technology-Team bei. Über VF VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, das beste Bekleidungs-, Schuhwerk- und Ausrüstungsunternehmen der Welt zu sein, und treibt ikonische Lifestyle-Marken wie The North Face®, Vans® und Timberland® voran. Erfahre mehr unter http://vfc.com . Wichtige Informationen - Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Bruttomonatsgehalt: 1.850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA-Hauptquartier in Stabio, Schweiz - Optimierter Bewerbungsprozess: 3 Interviews Eignungsvoraussetzungen - Du musst nach dem 1. Mai 2026 deinen Abschluss machen ODER im Juni 2026 Studentenstatus haben - Du musst die EU- oder EWR-Staatsbürgerschaft besitzen Sprechen wir über die Stelle! Bring deine Builder-Mentalität ein, um KI über ikonische Outdoor-Marken zu skalieren. Wir suchen einen AI & Digital Innovation Intern für schnelle Experimente mit Tools und Workflows, die digitale Erlebnisse von Anfang bis Ende verbessern. Führe schnelle Experimente im E-Commerce durch, indem du digitale Tools, Plattformen und Workflows evaluierst und testest. Arbeite funktionsübergreifend mit Engineering, Design und Marketing zusammen. Hier ist, wofür du verantwortlich sein wirst: - Unterstützung bei der Evaluierung und dem Testen neuer digitaler Tools, Plattformen und Workflows. - Zusammenarbeit mit Engineering-, Design- und Marketing-Teams. - Recherche zu aufkommenden Trends in E-Commerce, KI und digitalen Erfahrungsplattformen. - Gestaltung und Verfeinerung von Prompts und Guardrails für interne KI-Tools. - Probleme in Hypothesen umformulieren und leichtgewichtige Experimente entwerfen. Fähigkeiten, die dich erfolgreich machen: - Problem-Framing und Experimentierfähigkeiten. - E-Commerce- und DXP-Intuition (nice to have, nicht Pflicht). - Storytelling, das Entscheidungen vorantreibt. Was du dafür bekommst - Praxis-KI in der realen Welt: von der Idee über den Piloten bis zur messbaren Auswirkung. - Mentoring und Kompetenzentwicklung. - Portfolio-fertige Ergebnisse: Fallstudien, Prompt-Bibliotheken und Experiment-Berichte. Außerdem: - Hybride Arbeitspolitik - 50% Rabatt auf VF-Marken - Fitnessstudio vor Ort - Subventionierte Kantine - Shuttlebus oder ÖPNV-Rabatt - Lebhafte Praktikantengemeinschaft. Bist du dabei? Bewirb dich jetzt! #readytoapply R-20260213-0011

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Data Science Intern for our Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for a Data Science Intern for: - Supporting the Data Science product lifecycle management: Data Mining, Data Cleaning, Data Exploration, Feature engineering, Predictive modelling - Run ad hoc data extract and data transformation across different data source - Run preliminary explorative analysis to identify trends, patterns and correlations - Work in cloud environment accessing to the latest AI and GenAI technologies. What’s in it for you - Extensive exposure to different Data processing and Data Science technologies such as: Python, SQL - Exposure to end-to-end complex projects, with many chances to see how to relate with technical and business stakeholders in transformative processes inside a large Company - Exposure to Data Visualization and Business intelligence tools and creation of reporting across different domain and big data set How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You are fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills - You have curious mindset with passion for working with people - You are eager to learn and face up new challenges - You show initiative and strong drive to achieve yours and your team goals - First experience such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. What’s in it for you - Extensive exposure to different Data processing and Data Science technologies such as: Python, SQL - Exposure to end-to-end complex projects, with many chances to see how to relate with technical and business stakeholders in transformative processes inside a large Company - Exposure to Data Visualization and Business intelligence tools and creation of reporting across different domain and big data set How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You are fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills - You have curious mindset with passion for working with people - You are eager to learn and face up new challenges - You show initiative and strong drive to achieve yours and your team goals - First experience such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260211-0015

jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern for our Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you passionate about Retail Technology and eager to explore how GenAI is transforming the consumer and store experience? As a Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern, you will support the design, analysis and evolution of digital retail solutions across stores and omnichannel platforms, with a focus also on GenAI use cases, data‑driven decision making, and retail technology innovation. You will collaborate with cross‑functional teams to translate business needs into scalable, technology‑enabled solutions that enhance efficiency and customer experience. Here’s what you’ll be responsible for: - Support the analysis and documentation of retail technology processes (e.g. store systems, Order Management Systems, clienteling, order fulfilment, and omnichannel flows) - Contribute to GenAI initiatives, including use‑case discovery, functional analysis, prompt experimentation, and performance evaluation - Assist in translating business and user needs into functional requirements and solution concepts - Collaborate with product owners, engineers, data teams, and business stakeholders across EMEA - Contribute to data analysis, dashboards, or insight generation to support informed decision‑making - Support pilot initiatives, proof‑of‑concepts, and continuous improvement activities related to digital retail platforms How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - Strong interest in Retail Technology, Digital Commerce, and Store Technologies - Solid understanding of Generative AI concepts (e.g. LLMs, prompt engineering, AI‑assisted analytics) and curiosity to apply them in a business context - Analytical mindset with the ability to structure problems and interpret data - Familiarity with digital platforms, data flows, APIs, or cloud‑based systems is a plus - Ability to collaborate effectively in cross‑functional and international teams - Proactive attitude, learning mindset, and willingness to experiment and iterate - Fluency in English (written and spoken); knowledge of additional languages is a plus - A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Data Science, Business Technology, or similar is nice to have, but we are most interested in your curiosity, problem‑solving skills, and passion for retail innovation. What’s in it for you In this role, you will: - Gain hands‑on exposure to enterprise retail technology platforms used by global brands - Learn how GenAI is applied in real business scenarios, from process optimization to decision support - Work within an Agile, product‑driven environment, learning modern digital delivery practices - Collaborate with experienced product, technology, and business professionals across EMEA - Build a strong foundation for a career in Digital Retail, Product Management, or AI‑enabled Transformation By the end of the internship, you will have: - A practical understanding of retail digital ecosystems - Experience contributing to GenAI‑enabled initiatives - Increased confidence working with stakeholders, data, and technology solutions in a global organization The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Participate in dedicated skill-building workshops - Collaborate on an internal consulting group project - Gain real insights about our brands by spending one day of work in-store - Connect through networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0007

descriptionByLocale.it: Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #VFInternshipProgram presso il nostro quartier generale EMEA a Stabio, in Svizzera, come Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern per il nostro team Digital Technology. Chi è VF VF sta ridefinendo il significato di essere la migliore azienda mondiale di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature, alimentando marchi iconici di stile di vita attivo tra cui The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Sei appassionato di Retail Technology e desideroso di esplorare come GenAI sta trasformando l'esperienza del consumatore e del negozio? Come Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern, supporterai la progettazione, l'analisi e l'evoluzione di soluzioni di retail digitale attraverso negozi e piattaforme omnicanale, con un focus sui casi d'uso GenAI, il decision making basato sui dati e l'innovazione tecnologica nel retail. Collaborerai con team interfunzionali per tradurre le esigenze aziendali in soluzioni scalabili e tecnologicamente abilitanti che migliorano l'efficienza e l'esperienza del cliente. Ecco di cosa sarai responsabile: - Supportare l'analisi e la documentazione dei processi di retail technology (es. sistemi di negozio, Order Management Systems, clienteling, evasione ordini e flussi omnicanale) - Contribuire alle iniziative GenAI, inclusa la scoperta di casi d'uso, l'analisi funzionale, la sperimentazione dei prompt e la valutazione delle performance - Assistere nella traduzione delle esigenze aziendali e degli utenti in requisiti funzionali e concetti di soluzione - Collaborare con product owner, ingegneri, team dati e stakeholder aziendali in tutta la regione EMEA - Contribuire all'analisi dei dati, alle dashboard o alla generazione di insight per supportare il processo decisionale - Supportare iniziative pilota, proof-of-concept e attività di miglioramento continuo legate alle piattaforme di retail digitale Come farai la differenza Competenze che ti faranno avere successo: - Forte interesse per Retail Technology, Digital Commerce e tecnologie per i negozi - Solida comprensione dei concetti di IA generativa (es. LLM, prompt engineering, analisi assistita dall'AI) - Mentalità analitica con capacità di strutturare problemi e interpretare dati - Familiarità con piattaforme digitali, flussi di dati, API o sistemi cloud è un plus - Capacità di collaborare efficacemente in team interfunzionali e internazionali - Attitudine proattiva, mentalità di apprendimento e disponibilità a sperimentare - Fluenza in inglese; la conoscenza di lingue aggiuntive è un plus Cosa otterrai In questo ruolo, avrai: - Esposizione pratica alle piattaforme di retail technology enterprise - Esperienza di come GenAI viene applicata in scenari aziendali reali - Lavoro in un ambiente Agile e product-driven - Collaborazione con professionisti esperti di prodotto, tecnologia e business in tutta la regione EMEA Alla fine dello stage, avrai: - Una comprensione pratica degli ecosistemi digitali del retail - Esperienza nel contribuire a iniziative abilitate da GenAI - Maggiore fiducia nel lavorare con stakeholder, dati e soluzioni tecnologiche Il programma di stage EMEA di VF è un percorso di 12 mesi. Potrai godere di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - Sconto del 50% sui brand VF - Palestra in sede - Mensa sovvenzionata e aree relax con bevande gratuite - Navetta o sconto sui trasporti pubblici - Una vivace comunità di stagisti.
